---
title: "Schedule"
---

Lecture status is driven by each lecture's generated `manifest.yml`
(`migrated` / `planned` / `legacy-pdf`).

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->
| # | Lecture | Status | Links |
|---|---|---|---|
| 02 | Reconstruction Attacks | planned | [slides](lectures/02-reconstruction/slides.qmd) · [notebook](lectures/02-reconstruction/notebook.ipynb) |
| 03 | DP as Hypothesis Testing | planned | [slides](lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/slides.qmd) · [notebook](lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->

See [STATUS.md](STATUS.md) for live progress.
